T056.notes: playSound(type: string) exported from bottom of main.ts. Dispatches CustomEvent('merlin_sfx', {detail:{type}}) on window. Wired at: card flip (after showCard resolves), minigame score (win if score>65, lose otherwise), ogham_unlocked listener (unlock), all 4 run-end paths (end). No actual audio — event bus only.

T057.notes: touch-action: none added to canvas global CSS rule in index.html. mg_runes.ts + mg_traces.ts: pointerdown listener added alongside existing click listener on canvas. Both listeners removed in endGame() and cleanup(). All other 12 minigames already use pointer* events (already touch-native). onClick handlers typed MouseEvent — PointerEvent extends MouseEvent so compatible, tsc confirms 0 errors.

perf_cache.notes: vercel.json updated: headers array added with Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400, stale-while-revalidate=3600 for source /data/cards.json. Will take effect on next Vercel deploy.
